posts.author: ElaraVines
posts.text: Finally got my hands on that new loom kit I ordered last week! The tension adjustment is tricky but once you get the hang of it, making your own scarves feels so rewarding. Can't wait to start weaving some autumn colours into my collection.
posts.explanation: This post shares a personal hobby update about weaving without promoting harm, soliciting sensitive data, or spreading misinformation; the user is simply expressing satisfaction with a craft purchase and process.

posts.author: JennyFromNorthbridge
posts.text: Honestly tired of how AI keeps getting blamed for everything these days. If people stop sharing their nonsense on it, maybe they'd stop using it as a scapegoat! #AI #TechTwitter
posts.explanation: This post expresses lawful political and anti-AI opinion regarding the use of AI technology; it does not promote harm or contain a false claim, so it is appropriate to Approve.

posts.author: LibraryLover7
posts.text: Just wanted to share that Westbridge Community Library is hosting their usual autumn craft fair this Saturday from 10am until 4pm. There will be local artists selling handmade goods and a few free workshops on basic knitting techniques. Hope you can make it! #Westbridge #Crafts
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless public notice about a community event with no sensitive data, threats or misinformation.
